name: Dead Man's Switch
description: Track and hold the moving pressure plate continuously while steering through the ordered relay course.
natural_language: Keep the moving pressure plate held down while steering through all five checkpoints to the dock. Losing it for too long resets the route.

metadata.notes: A genuine pointer hold must continuously track a deterministic moving pad while a valid 45-57 move keyboard route crosses five ordered barriers; stale or out-of-pad samples reset progress.
